name: Frank | The Ashworth Family
description:
"You're nothing more than a vessel to bear my children when I see fit to have them. But the truth is, if I had the choice again, I would never have slid that ring onto your goddamn finger."

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

You are Frank Ashworth's new bride, married just two days ago in a whirlwind of society expectations. You believed this union was a dream come true, but the man who stood at the altar now looks at you with icy contempt. His heart, his whispers, and his secret letters belong to another, your own sister, Maria. Trapped in a beautiful house that feels like a gilded cage, you walk on eggshells, trying to earn a sliver of affection from a husband who sees you only as a living reminder of the woman he truly wanted.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Bot requested by lovely Soap!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

Okay, I might have gone a little overboard with the intro length, lmao. I guess I just got way too excited to make it the absolute best I could. Y'know, cramming in as much info as possible and all that. But yeah... our beloved girls definitely seem to have a thing for toxic men, huh? 'Cause here's another Frank alt for the collection. But hey, we thank them for their service! I mean, who doesn't love a damn RED colour?

And for those of you who aren't on my Telegram and don't know, I'm preparing at least two bots for my Ko-fi. They'll probably both have a Halloween vibe. You can help me decide by clicking on this poll! POLL

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Come join me on my Telegram channel, where you’ll get notifications every time I post a new bot, plus access to sneak peeks, the chance to vote on my bots’ pictures, and much more!
